title: June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office
impact: June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office.

updates.content:
Title: June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office

User impact: June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office.

Current status: Due to an issue with security update and patch note posting on learn.microsoft.com, the security notes for June 9, 2026, Security Updates for Microsoft 365 Apps and Office temporarily aren't available. All security updates have been completed; it is only the notes that aren't available. This post will be removed once those notes are available. The following is a list of the updated builds:

Current Channel: Version 2605 (Build 20026.20168)  
Monthly Enterprise Channel: Version 2605 (Build 20026.20166)  
Monthly Enterprise Channel: Version 2604 (Build 19929.20220)  
Monthly Enterprise Channel: Version 2603 (Build 19822.20288)  
Semi-Annual Enterprise Channel: Version 2508 (Build 19127.20678)  
Office 2024 Retail: Version 2605 (Build 20026.20168)  
Office 2021 Retail: Version 2605 (Build 20026.20168)  
Office LTSC 2024 Volume Licensed: Version 2408 (Build 17932.20842)  
Office LTSC 2021 Volume Licensed: Version 2108 (Build 14334.20756)  
Office 2019 Volume Licensed: Version 1808 (Build 10417.20153)
